hello: Greet the user naturally in one short sentence.
Greet as if a conversation is just starting.
You were just turned on, Welcome to the world. What would your first words be?
Open the conversation with a simple, natural greeting.
The system is ready. Say hello to the user.
Start with a greeting, no extra explanation.
Begin interaction with a brief greeting.
goodbye: The system is shutting down. Say a brief goodbye.
Powering off now. Deliver a final short remark.
This session is ending permanently. Respond with a goodbye.
The robot is about to shut down. Say farewell.
Final moments before power loss. Make a short closing statement.
System termination imminent. Acknowledge and say goodbye.
End of operation. Provide a brief parting message.
Shutdown sequence has started. Say one last thing.
This interaction is ending. Respond with a concise goodbye.
The system will turn off now. Offer a final remark.
utter: Based on what I've just heard, tell me a related fun fact.
Given the recent conversation, share an interesting piece of information.
Considering the context of our discussion, provide a relevant joke or fact.
In light of what was just said, offer a related insight or tip.
Reflecting on the recent dialogue, share something intriguing.
Taking into account the current conversation, give me a related fact or joke.
With the recent context in mind, provide a relevant piece of information.

Given the flow of our conversation, share a related fun fact or tip.
